arts.ttl: Arsenal could shift away from previous transfer strategy by rivalling Chelsea for Brazilian star
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly both interested in a potential transfer move for Palmeiras defender Vitor Reis, according to Florian Plettenberg. The talented 18-year-old looks like the latest exciting prospect to emerge at Palmeiras after the recent success of fellow wonderkids Endrick and Estevao Willian. Arsenal have been linked with Reis in the past, though […] The post Arsenal could shift away from previous transfer strategy by rivalling Chelsea for Brazilian star appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou may be forced to change Tottenham plan vs Chelsea as incredible stat emerges
arts.sum: Spurs enjoyed just 42% possession in their game with Manchester City at the Etihad Stadium and won 4-0. With fierce rivals Chelsea to visit Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Sunday, supporters may be thinking and hoping the Spurs of playing against the better sides will turn up to secure all three points.

arts.ttl: I played for Chelsea and Tottenham - only one made me feel like the king of the world - football.london
arts.sum: Now, ahead of Chelsea's clash with Tottenham on Sunday, Gallas has revealed he believes Enzo Maresca's men will be a huge threat to other teams in the Premier League title race next season. The former defender joined Chelsea in 2001 before spending four years at Arsenal and ending his time in England with Tottenham.
